title: Implement HTTP request fixtures and local smoke client
context: Add HTTP request fixtures and a local smoke client to support testing the PM Agent HTTP server before and after Cloud Run deploy. No external API calls. No Secret values.
acceptanceCriteria: fixtures/pm-agent/*.json files exist and parse as valid JSON
validateTaskPacket passes for all three fixtures
decideTaskRoute returns expected routing for each fixture
tools/pm-agent-http-client.js exports requestJson / getHealth / getInfo / postDryRunTask / runLocalClientDemo
